title: 9 Managing Requests
body_text:
9	Managing Requests
9.1 	Overview of Managing Requests
The following actions require the approval of another User Management Security Officer (Security Officer):
Changes to a Client Center User芒聙聶s or a Security Officer芒聙聶s name and contact information.
Changes to a Client Center User芒聙聶s or a Security Officer芒聙聶s account status.
Changes to some application permissions. See the application specific information in Chapter 8, Managing Application Access and Permissions, for more information.
Resetting your own User Management password. See Section 6.6, Resetting a User芒聙聶s Password, for more information.
Note:	A user can only have one set of changes pending approval per application.
9.2	Approving or Rejecting Requests
Approve or reject requests as follows:
Select
Manage Requests
from the navigation menu. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Select 芒聙聹Manage Requests芒聙聺
Select a request type to view a list of requests. See Figure 2.
芒聢聮
Credit Union Requests
芒聙聯 Displays pending requests for Client Centre Users and other  Security Officers at your financial institution.
芒聢聮
Business Requests
芒聙聯 Displays pending requests for your financial institution芒聙聶s Business Users (e.g., for
PaymentStream
AFT business users).
Figure 2: Select 芒聙聹Request Type芒聙聺
Select the appropriate request from the list.
Review the pending changes. 芒聙聹New芒聙聺 displays in green text next to the change(s).
Select
Show Current Values
to view the current settings. See Figures 3 and 4.
Figure 3: Viewing Changes that Require Approval
Figure 4: Viewing the Current Values of the User芒聙聶s Profile (After Selecting 芒聙聹Show Current Values芒聙聺)
Select
Approve Changes
or
Reject Changes
as appropriate. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Choosing to Approve or Reject the Changes.
9.3	Cancelling Pending Requests
You can cancel changes you芒聙聶ve made to Client Centre Users or other Security Officers if they芒聙聶re pending approval.
Cancel a pending request as follows:
Select
Manage Requests
from the navigation menu. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: Select 芒聙聹Manage Requests芒聙聺
Select
My Requests
to display your pending requests. See Figure 7.
Figure 7: Select 芒聙聹My Requests芒聙聺
Select the appropriate request from the list.
Select
Cancel Changes
. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Select 芒聙聹Cancel Changes芒聙聺
